ddls:
CREATE TABLE "senior_centers" (
  "center_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each senior center */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the senior center */,
  "program" TEXT /* Program type (e.g., Regional Senior Center) */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Location of the senior center (address and coordinates) */,
  "hours_of_operation" TEXT /* Hours of operation for the senior center */,
  "phone_id" INTEGER /* Phone number of the senior center */,
  "fax_id" INTEGER /* Fax number of the senior center */,
  "admin_id" INTEGER /* Administrator responsible for the senior center */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* County where the senior center is located */,
  "email_id" INTEGER /* Email address of the senior center */,
  "website_id" INTEGER /* Website URL of the senior center */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* User rating for the senior center */,
  "date_established" TEXT /* Date the senior center was established */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date the center's information was updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Operational status of the senior center (e.g., active, closed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("center_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_senior_centers_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_senior_centers_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_senior_centers_phone_id FOREIGN KEY ("phone_id") REFERENCES phones ("phone_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_senior_centers_admin_id FOREIGN KEY ("admin_id") REFERENCES admins ("admin_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_senior_centers_website_id FOREIGN KEY ("website_id") REFERENCES websites ("website_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_senior_centers_fax_id FOREIGN KEY ("fax_id") REFERENCES faxes ("fax_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_senior_centers_email_id FOREIGN KEY ("email_id") REFERENCES emails ("email_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "programs" (
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each program */,
  "program_name" TEXT /* Name of the program */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the program */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the program (e.g., health, social, educational) */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the program (e.g., daily, weekly) */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the program (e.g., 1 hour, 2 hours) */,
  "eligibility" TEXT /* Eligibility criteria for the program */,
  "fee" TEXT /* Fee for the program (e.g., free, $10) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "center_programs" (
  "center_id" INTEGER /* ID of the senior center */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the program */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the program at the center */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the program at the center */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("center_id", "program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the senior center */,
  "coordinates" TEXT /* Coordinates of the senior center */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the senior center is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the senior center is located */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the senior center */,
  "time_zone" TEXT /* Time zone of the senior center */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "admins" (
  "admin_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each administrator */,
  "admin_name" TEXT /* Name of the administrator */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the administrator */,
  "phone_id" INTEGER /* Phone number of the administrator */,
  "address_id" INTEGER /* Address of the administrator */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the administrator (e.g., director, assistant) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("admin_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_admins_phone_id FOREIGN KEY ("phone_id") REFERENCES phones ("phone_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_admins_address_id FOREIGN KEY ("address_id") REFERENCES admin_addresses ("address_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "counties" (
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each county */,
  "county_name" TEXT /* Name of the county */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "phones" (
  "phone_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each phone number */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the senior center */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("phone_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "faxes" (
  "fax_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fax number */,
  "fax_number" TEXT /* Fax number of the senior center */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fax_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "websites" (
  "website_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each website */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* Website URL of the senior center */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("website_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "emails" (
  "email_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each email address */,
  "email_address" TEXT /* Email address of the senior center */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("email_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "admin_addresses" (
  "address_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each address */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the administrator */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the administrator is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the administrator is located */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the administrator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("address_id")
)
